extensions.official.description: Reference dataset surface for Earth DEM providers.

stability.rationale: Conservative provisional classification for provides.earth.dem.v1; semantics remain loadable but are not yet frozen for release governance.
stability.replacement_target: Replace provisional provides surfaces with release-pinned LIB and PACK-COMPAT provider definitions.
